2604.08335.title: Dead Weights, Live Signals: Feedforward Graphs of Frozen Language Models
2604.08335.paper_summary: We present a feedforward graph architecture in which heterogeneous frozen large language models serve as computational nodes, communicating through a shared continuous latent space via learned linear projections. Building on recent work demonstrating geometric compatibility between independently trained LLM latent spaces~\cite{armstrong2026thinking}, we extend this finding from static two-model steering to end-to-end trainable multi-node graphs, where projection matrices are optimized jointly via backpropagation through residual stream injection hooks. Three small frozen models (Llama-3.2-1B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, Gemma-2-2B) encode the input into a shared latent space whose aggregate signal is injected into two larger frozen models (Phi-3-mini, Mistral-7B), whose representations feed a lightweight cross-attention output node. With only 17.6M trainable parameters against approximately 12B frozen, the architecture achieves 87.3\% on ARC-Challenge, 82.8\% on OpenBookQA, and 67.2\% on MMLU, outperforming the best single constituent model by 11.4, 6.2, and 1.2 percentage points respectively, and outperforming parameter-matched learned classifiers on frozen single models by 9.1, 5.2, and 6.7 points. Gradient flow through multiple frozen model boundaries is empirically verified to be tractable, and the output node develops selective routing behavior across layer-2 nodes without explicit supervision.
2604.08335.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一種前饋圖架構，其中異質的凍結大型語言模型作為計算節點，通過學習的線性投影在共享的連續潛在空間中進行通信。基於最近的研究，展示了獨立訓練的LLM潛在空間之間的幾何相容性~\cite{armstrong2026thinking}，我們將這一發現從靜態的雙模型引導擴展到端到端可訓練的多節點圖，其中投影矩陣通過殘差流注入鉤子進行聯合優化。三個小型凍結模型（Llama-3.2-1B、Qwen2.5-1.5B、Gemma-2-2B）將輸入編碼到共享潛在空間中，其聚合信號被注入到兩個較大的凍結模型（Phi-3-mini、Mistral-7B）中，這些模型的表示供應給一個輕量級的交叉注意力輸出節點。僅用17.6M可訓練參數對抗約12B的凍結參數，該架構在ARC-Challenge上達到87.3\%、在OpenBookQA上達到82.8\%、在MMLU上達到67.2\%，分別超過最佳單一組成模型11.4、6.2和1.2個百分點，並在凍結單一模型上超過參數匹配的學習分類器9.1、5.2和6.7點。通過多個凍結模型邊界的梯度流經驗上被驗證為可行，並且輸出節點在沒有明確監督的情況下在層-2節點之間發展出選擇性路由行為。
2604.08335.author: Marcus Armstrong et.al.
2604.08335.authors: Marcus Armstrong, Navid Ayoobi, Arjun Mukherjee
